phaseName: Full Loop Orchestrator + QA Guarantee Gate v1
summary: Consolidates command inbox sequencing, canonical prompt/request/lease creation, bridge/download routing, runtime snapshots, timeout BLOCKED handoffs, QA Guarantee proof, and safe auto-merge approval after PASS_GUARANTEED.

qaGuarantee.purpose: PASS is promoted to PASS_GUARANTEED only after real-use proof of the phase deliverables.
realUseProofs: Select next command by smallest phase number above latest CLOSED_CLEANLY phase
Create fresh canonical prompt, artifact-watch-request.json, and generation lease from JSON
Create BLOCKED handoff on timeout or missing ZIP
Promote PASS to PASS_GUARANTEED only after functional proof
Auto-move MERGE_PENDING to MERGE_APPROVED only when safe-auto-merge policy permits
